'''badafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygarctia|pygarctia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-d-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygarctia|pygarctia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| badafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || bædæfæth || bædæfæj || bædæfæsh || bædæfæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || badadafath || badadafaj || badadafash || badadafa
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || badafath || badafaj || badafash || badafa
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || badaffafth || badaffafj || badaffafsh || badaffaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || badafatha || badafaja || badafasha || badafaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || badafath || badafaj || badafash || badafa
|-
| [[Possessive]] || badafathal || badafajal || badafashal || badafakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || badafaathatha || badafaajaja || badafaashasha || badafaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || badafathan || badafajan || badafashan || badafakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || badafathaoro || badafajaoro || badafashaoro || badafakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
